title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at SSC Tube - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at SSC Tube - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
SSC Tube invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Patna location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SSC Tube:
SSC Tube is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SSC Tube!
